description: Use this API routine to return complex induction machine quantities. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, cmpval = inddt2(ibus, id, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the induction machine quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Machine zero sequence fault analysis impedance.
Actual power flowing from the bus to the machine in MW Mvar.
Same as ‘PQ’ in units determined by the power output option setting.

error_codes.description: Bus not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Induction machine not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Bus type code is not 2 or 3; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ returned.
Induction machine is out-of-service; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ returned.
Invalid value of ‘STRING’; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Sequence data not in case (when STRING = ‘ZZERO’ or ZGRND’).
